results.rendered_html:
valgita p. p.
1 Jumped, bounded, leaped &c.
2 Moved, made to dance;  Kāv. 2. 73. 
— taṃ
1 A gallop, one of the paces of a horse.
2 Swaggering, boasting, vaunt; nimittādaparāddheṣordhānuṣkasyeva valgitaṃ  Śi. 2. 27.
